build.buildCommand: npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: echo '==> (1) prisma db push' && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --skip-generate && echo '==> (2) seed admin' && node prisma/seed-prod.js || echo '==> (2) seed falhou' ; echo '==> (3) iniciando Nest' && node dist/main
